title: Aryna Sabalenka Wins Big Tennis Tournament
summary: Aryna Sabalenka is a top tennis player from Belarus. She won the Miami Open tournament by beating Coco Gauff in a close match. The score was 6-2, 4-6, 6-3. This win makes her the first woman since 2022 to win both the Indian Wells and Miami tournaments in the same year, called the 'Sunshine Double'. Sabalenka has won three tournaments this year and lost only one match. She is very proud of her hard work and fighting spirit. Coco Gauff played well too and will move up in the world rankings. Tennis is a sport where players hit a ball over a net, and tournaments like this are exciting events.

background_read: Tennis is a popular sport played worldwide, where players compete in tournaments to win titles and improve their rankings. Major tournaments like the Miami Open attract top players and fans. The 'Sunshine Double' is a rare achievement in women's tennis, showing a player's skill and consistency. Players train hard and often travel to different countries to play matches, making it a global sport.

WHY: To complete the 'Sunshine Double' and show her strong performance this year
